manageOrganisationsPageDescription: This page allows you to configure the organizational information that will be associated with your additional IP block addresses for WHOIS record customization.
manageOrganisationsPageHowto: A specific ARIN or RIPE IP organization can then be configured by selecting "Configure IP block information" from the menu of any IP block on the main IP list.
manageOrganisationsSuccessMessage: Your information has been successfully recorded
manageOrganisationsDelete_confirm_input: Enter the name of the organization in the field below to confirm
manageOrganisationsDelete_confirm_headli: Do you want to delete this IP organization?
manageOrganisationsDelete_confirm_descri: This action will permanently delete the organization
manageOrganisationsDelete_unknown_error: An error occurred while deleting the organization: {{error}}
manageOrganisationsDelete_includedInIpBl: This IP organization is still in use with some IP blocks. Please disassociate it first.
